violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice disposed. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024

Various food product was observed held at (45-50) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
Inspector observed a cloth being used to cover hot dog buns.PIC informed to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024

Prep Unit located in the front counter area was not in good repair. Ambient temperature observed at 48DF. PIC informed. Unit taken out of service. Food product prepared within proper time temperature for food safety was removed and stored into another unit. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food in unit until repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024

The floors in walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
